narration_text:
Your prayer is heard. Here are seven things to check next.

First, examine your motives. James 4:3 warns that wrong desires can block answers, so ask God to search and purify your heart, like Psalm 139 teaches.

Second, release unforgiveness. Mark 11:25 invites us to let go so our prayers can flow freely.

Third, remember God's timing. Sometimes answers come as seasons, not seconds.

Fourth, pray through spiritual warfare. Use Scripture, stand firm, and keep persistent in prayer.

Fifth, check your persistence. Luke 18 calls us to keep knocking and not give up.

Sixth, consider stewardship. You may be being tested—be faithful in the small things.

Seventh, God may be redirecting you. Trust Romans 8:28 that He works all things together for good.

Download the 7-day Prayer Audit to walk through these steps and put them into practice.
